title.rendered: We’re Proud to Win Silver at the British Travel Awards 2025

content.rendered:
Travel FX is absolutely thrilled to have been awarded Silver for Best Foreign Exchange Retailer 2025 at the British Travel Awards. This recognition means the world to us because it comes directly from the people who matter most – you, our customers. Every vote represents real trust from real travellers, and we couldn’t be prouder.

A star-studded night at Grosvenor House

This year, our team had the honour of attending the star-studded British Travel Awards ceremony at the Grosvenor House Hotel in London. Surrounded by leading names from across the travel industry, it was a truly unforgettable evening. When Travel FX was announced as the Silver winner, the moment felt even more special.

Graham Tennant, Director at Travel FX, said:
“Winning Silver means everything to us because it’s voted for by our customers. We may not have the physical presence of the big high-street brands, but what we do have is the trust of travellers across the UK and that’s worth far more. This award is a testament to the dedication of our team and the loyalty of the people who choose Travel FX year after year.”

Voted for by the British public and that’s what makes it truly meaningful

The British Travel Awards are entirely voted for by the public, which makes this achievement especially significant. Instead of being judged behind closed doors, the results reflect genuine opinions from UK holidaymakers. Because of that, your support has placed us among the industry’s most trusted travel money providers once again.

A long-standing reputation built on trust, value, and reliability

This year’s Silver award continues a pattern we’re incredibly proud of. Over many years, Travel FX has consistently ranked in the top positions at the British Travel Awards. Consequently, this ongoing recognition highlights the confidence customers place in us and the strength of the service we deliver.

In an industry where reliability matters, your ongoing trust reinforces that our focus on great rates, transparency, and customer-first service is truly working.

Online versus high street, why this Silver matters even more

Winning Silver as an online-only FX retailer is a powerful achievement. Each year, we compete against household-name brands with high-street shops and airport branches. These organisations benefit from visibility, footfall, and large marketing budgets. Despite that, travellers across the UK continue to choose Travel FX because of the value we provide.

By comparison, we rely on competitive pricing, excellent service, word-of-mouth recommendations, and a smooth online experience. Your votes clearly show that travellers appreciate the difference.
As a result, this Silver award proves that you don’t need bricks and mortar to deliver top-tier service; you simply need dedication, consistency, and customer trust.

Thank you for your incredible support

Every member of the Travel FX team wants to say a heartfelt thank you. Your votes, reviews, and recommendations allow us to stand strong against much larger competitors. Moreover, your loyalty enables us to keep offering better value, better service, and a better experience for travellers nationwide.

We will never take that support for granted.

Our promise: exceptional service and great rates, always

Moving forward, we remain committed to delivering the standards that earned this award:

  • Consistently competitive exchange rates

  • Dependable, efficient service

  • Continuous improvements to our platform

  • Clear, honest communication with every order

Whether you’re preparing for a weekend break or the holiday of a lifetime, Travel FX will continue providing outstanding value for your travel money.

If you’re travelling soon, you can check our latest exchange rates or order your travel money online today – it only takes a moment.

Thank you again

Thank you for every vote, every review, and every recommendation. Winning Silver is a huge achievement, and it’s all thanks to you.

If you’re travelling soon, you can check our latest rates here.

itemListElement.name: We’re Proud to Win Silver at the British Travel Awards 2025

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
